products.title: Satiné
products.description: Natural Tanning Oil – Non Shimmery. A lightweight tanning oil that deeply nourishes the skin while enhancing a natural, sun-kissed glow. Leaves your skin soft, smooth, and beautifully bronzed without shimmer.

products.title: Lustra
products.description: Natural Tanning Oil – Shimmery. A nourishing tanning oil infused with delicate golden shimmer for a radiant, luminous finish. Hydrates the skin while enhancing your natural tan.

products.title: Solace
products.description: Cooling After Sun Cream. A soothing after-sun cream that cools, hydrates, and comforts sun-exposed skin. Fast-absorbing and lightweight for soft, refreshed skin after every sun-filled day.

products.title: Velvet Lip Balm
products.description: A luxurious lip balm that melts effortlessly into the lips, delivering deep hydration and lasting softness with a smooth, velvety finish.

products.title: Rose Glow
products.description: A soft rosy pink gloss that leaves lips naturally radiant and hydrated.

products.title: Pink Metal
products.description: A soft pink gloss with delicate shimmer for a luminous, glossy finish.

products.title: Cherry Crush
products.description: A vibrant cherry pink gloss with rich color and a glass-like shine.
